action.reasoning: Observation: Best LPIPS=0.3142 with cam_dist=0.25, fovy=35.0 on 5 val objects. Parameter search shows diminishing returns around this optimum. predict.py is truncated and incomplete. Analysis: Need to finalize predict.py with optimal settings and submit for baseline evaluation. Also should test: 1) Higher resolution rendering (512x512 then downsample), 2) Fine-grained search around 0.2-0.25, 3) Per-object adaptive distance. Decision: Write complete predict.py with cam_dist=0.25, fovy=35, test quickly, and submit for evaluation. Then iterate on improvements.
